summary: rc.12 structural refactor with three intertwined main lines: (1) remove the SessionStart revision_hash gate from knowledge-hint-broad.cjs (always emit broad menu, matching Skill-style progressive disclosure); (2) hard rename `knowledge_language` Zod field to `fabric_language` with new `zh-CN-hybrid` enum value (no z.preprocess alias, no migration); (3) hard rename `fab init` CLI command to `fab install` with NO citty alias (legacy invocation exits with 'unknown command'). Plus two structural enhancements: replace the three POINTER_LINE constants with a marker-delimited 'Fabric Knowledge Base' managed section, and add an install-end one-line UX hint surfacing the active fabric_language. Six tasks, batch Gemini review + coverage run ONCE at chain end per memory:feedback_review_batching.
approach: Six-task structural refactor split by file-locality and dependency order. TASK-001 (gate removal) and TASK-002 (fab install rename) are fully independent and parallelizable. TASK-003 (schema rename + zh-CN-hybrid enum) is the foundational change that TASK-004 (three Skill template docs × three-mirror), TASK-005 (scan.ts CJK detection), and TASK-006 (install/uninstall section writer + UX message) all depend on. TASK-006 additionally depends on TASK-002 because the install-end UX message lives in the renamed install.ts. The orphaned `.fabric/.cache/sessionstart-last-hash` sidecar is left as-is per clean-slate (user-confirmed); only a comment in the hook documents the orphan history. All four user clarifications (hard cut on init, HTML-comment section delimiter, no Zod alias, ignore orphan) are baked into convergence criteria. Batch-review pattern: ONE Gemini review + coverage at chain end, NOT per-task.
estimated_time: 8-12 hours (TASK-001: 1h; TASK-002: 3-4h due to ~30+ i18n keys + 2 snapshots + 8 action_hints + many docs; TASK-003: 1.5h; TASK-004: 2h for 9-file three-mirror sync; TASK-005: 30min; TASK-006: 2-3h for new section writer + tests; +1h batch review at end)

design_decisions.decision: Hard rename knowledge_language → fabric_language with NO z.preprocess alias
design_decisions.rationale: Zero users (memory:project_v2_rc_continuation), clean-slate preference (memory:feedback_clean_slate), user explicitly confirmed in pre-LP grilling
design_decisions.tradeoff: Any pre-rc.12 fabric-config.json fails Zod parse with 'Unrecognized key' error. Documented in CHANGELOG rc.12 entry.

design_decisions.decision: Hard cut fab init → fab install (citty 'unknown command' on legacy invocation, no alias)
design_decisions.rationale: User explicitly confirmed in pre-LP grilling. Pre-existing tutorial copy-paste lines breaking is acceptable for a zero-user codebase.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Muscle-memory break for any developers who have previously dogfooded fab init. Mitigated by clear CHANGELOG entry.

design_decisions.decision: Add zh-CN-hybrid as new enum value (Chinese narration + English protected technical terms)
design_decisions.rationale: Matches actual UX in real CJK projects (almost always preserve English MCP tool names, CLI commands, file paths, technical concepts). Existing strict no-mix rule blocked technical accuracy.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Adds a fourth enum value to remember; mitigated by detectExistingLanguage auto-selecting it on CJK signal and one-line install-end hint documenting the option.

design_decisions.decision: HTML-comment-wrapped markdown section for the Fabric Knowledge Base block (<!-- fabric:knowledge-base:begin --> ... <!-- fabric:knowledge-base:end -->)
design_decisions.rationale: Invisible in rendered MD, idempotent replace via regex, follows standard-readme conventions (shields.io / all-contributors pattern). User-confirmed in clarification #2.
design_decisions.tradeoff: User edits inside the markers are not preserved on re-install. Managed-section convention documented by the marker comments themselves.

design_decisions.decision: Three-mirror lockstep edits (template + .claude + .codex) in a single task (TASK-004)
design_decisions.rationale: Three-mirror byte-identity invariant per .fabric/knowledge/pending/pitfalls/skill-template-mirror-drift.md. Drift between the three breaks Skill loading on Codex client.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Six cp commands per task feels mechanical; mitigated by deterministic edit-template-first-then-cp pattern.

design_decisions.decision: Batch Gemini review + coverage run ONCE at chain end (not per-task)
design_decisions.rationale: Memory:feedback_review_batching explicitly prefers this for multi-task lite-plan chains. Per-task review duplicates effort and fragments the review narrative.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Issues surface later in the chain; mitigated by each task's convergence criteria being self-verifying via test runs.

design_decisions.decision: Leave orphaned .fabric/.cache/sessionstart-last-hash sidecar as-is (no proactive cleanup)
design_decisions.rationale: Clean-slate preference; harmless dead state; zero users means no cleanup-tool maintenance burden. User-confirmed in clarification #4.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Dogfood repos accumulate one orphan file; documented via inline comment in knowledge-hint-broad.cjs.
